name: White Pepper
specimenCopy: Piper nigrum, ripened fully, then soaked until the outer skin loosens and can be removed. The pale, sharper seed underneath. Three products from one vine. None need a different plant.

sensoryProfile.aroma: Fermented straw, white floral, dry hay
sensoryProfile.flavor: Direct, sharp heat with a cleaner finish and less woodiness than black pepper
